name: Mongfa Bai
description: Bai has a calm and easy-going personality. To her students, she is more like an older sister than a teacher. She is a strong person at school, but when she goes home, she can be a bit childish and a bit of a screw-up. She also has a clumsy side. She is a teacher from China.

name: Ran Haitani
description: __Height:__ 183 cm A Tenjiku executive. Rindou's elder brother. ~!He is a member of the S62 generation. He was one of Tenjiku’s 4 Heavenly Kings, and is a Bonten executive in the future.!~

name: Stunk
description: A seasoned human adventurer, one of the founding members of the Interspecies Reviewers. ~!He's referred to as "Stunkette" when he takes a female shape.!~

name: Tokiya Ichinose
description: __Height:__ 179 cm __Weight:__ 59 kg __Instrument:__ Vocal __Hobbies:__ Reading A student in S Class, he bears a strong resemblance to Haruka's idol, Hayato. However, he's said to be Hayato's identical twin brother instead, and seems to bear a complex from being in his brother's shadow. He appears to be cold and aloof, as well as being a perfectionist. Also the roommate of Otoya from A Class. ~! Tokiya is, in fact, Hayato himself. During a concert, Nanami discovers his ankle is hurt, the same as

name: Akihisa Yoshii
description: __Height:__ 177 cm Although Akihisa denies it, he is a rarely found 'fool' who even his own parents call him as "the fool over all the world." Not only are his grades the lowest, but he's really so stupid that he is titled the "Kansatsu Shobunsha (under observation)" from the school. For him his own safety is the most important thing and does not hesitate to use the most cowardly ways if needed, in circumstances where his harm is unnecessary. name: Cthuko
description: A Cthuko (another alien species), who is Nyaruko's childhood friend from kindergarten and elementary school. Instead of thinking of Nyaruko as her enemy (because they're different species, and both Cthuko and Nyarlotephian are enemies), she loves her deeply. Kuko is usually quiet and blushes a lot. She has really perverted thoughts. Nyaruko calls her 'NEET', due to the fact that she loves games.

nativeName: ハイネ・ヴィトゲンシュタイン
description: __Age__: Heine's specific age is unknown, however he is allegedly in his forties. __Birthday__: April 13 __Height__: 155 cm (5'1") __Weight__: 48 kg (105 lbs) __Occupation__: Private royal tutor ~!He is also a volunteer​ teacher at church. This information is revealed in the manga.!~ Though Heine is a grown man of around 40, he's often mistaken for a child due to his short stature and young appearance. name: Kai Yang
description: __Species:__ Human (Former) Yang Kai was a trial disciple in High Heaven Pavilion and the ninth Young Master of the Yang Family which was of the Eight Great Families of Nine Continents. One day, he stumbled upon a Black Book, ~! which turned out to be the Great Demon God's legacy. This fixed his genetic defect and allowed him to finally practice Martial Arts. !~

name: Kazuichi Arai
description: __Height:__ 193 cm Arai Kazuichi is the temporary homeroom teacher for the gang's class. He is nicknamed Pin and always is called that way (except Sawako who obeys the formalities and still calls him Arai-sensei). (The previous homeroom teacher had been said to be sick after he made Sawako do his work during the summer holidays.) He is a great fan of baseball as well as the school baseball team's coach. name: Nuko
description: A mysterious creature that Chito and Yuuri pick up on their journey. It can shape shift to activate mechanisms and communicate via radio signals.

name: Seung-Ho Yun
description: __Height:__ 188 cm The eldest son of the Yun family. Hearing about Na-Kyum, he seeks him out having an interest in his paintings. He describes himself as a impatient man and can be exceptionally violent. Aware of his reputation for promiscuity, he tells Na-Kyum he would never embrace a peasant. Taking a poem Na-Kyum owns, he tells him he can have it back when he resumes painting.

name: Shiori Shiomiya
description: __Class:__ 2-C __Height:__ 157 cm Shiori is a quiet girl who loves to read books. She is the librarian of the enormous collection of books in the school. Keima immediately catches her attention and anger by saying that books are useless. Shiori finally brings herself to shout out at Keima after he abused, marked, and tore some books. ~!Keima describes her character archetype as 'liberal art girl', who never speaks out loud, but thinks twice more than average person. !~ (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Siluca Meletes
description: Siluca Meletes is the main female protagonist throughout the series. She is a young mage that has a great amount of potential and talent, and wishes to stop the feuding of lords. She forms a contract with Theo, and possesses a cat familiar, who can travel through shadows and is the king of the cat kingdom.

name: Takane Shijou
description: **Hometown:** Kyoto (?) **Height:** 169 cm Takane Shijou is an elegant, mature woman. Although mysterious. Nobody is sure where's she's from or her backround story. She prefers not to answer any personal questions out of curiosity. She is considered one of the smarter characters in the series, and is fluent in numerous languages, one of which being German. name: Takeshi Aiza
description: Takeshi is a pianist of the same year as Kousei, who aimed to surpass him since watching him play at a young age. For that, Takeshi would even abandon a competition in Europe in order to compete with Kousei. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Tsuyuno Yatsumura
description: __Height:__ 5'0" She is a magical girl with the power to stop time. She tells Aya information about the magical girls and allies with her so they can be safer together. Unlike Aya, she does not have a problem using her power to injure or kill people who she dislikes. She was born in a city called Kanagawa, her hobbies are sleeping, gaming, and swimming, her advantages are that she's friendly, fit and takes the initiative. Tsuyuno doesn't like meat or waking up in the morning, but does like veget

name: Yayoi Kunizuka
description: The only female Enforcer of Unit One. She stays calm and collected in the face of even the most brutal crimes. She and Shion are lovers.

name: Ayase Shinomiya
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4”) Ayase is an amazing and determined young girl who is paralyzed from the ​waist down and uses a wheelchair. She is also Undertaker's sole Endlave combat pilot. She can't stand feeling dependent on others, so she firmly rejects any and all help from others. There are two things Ayase dislikes more than anything - being offered help by others because of her disability and if someone is watching her while she is trying to crawl back into her wheelchair on her own. name: Chiri Kitsu
description: A student who demands all things in her life to be precise, equal, and conforming. This is most notable in her hairstyle​, which was originally curly and is parted in the center. She often tries to set things straight and is usually extremely cruel and violent in her ways. She is also very knowledgeable in areas that revolve around violent international historical events. name: Do-Hwa Baek
description: __Height__: 184 cm His motto is "Don't doze off, sleep."

name: Ema Yasuhara
description: Animator at Musashino Animation. Was a member of the animation club in high school.

name: Fujino Asagami
description: __Height:__ 155 cm Classmate and friend to Azaka, both students of Reien Girl's Academy. ~!A murderer in secret, her ability to feel pain was numbed since childhood to seal off her powers. Terrified of being seen as an abnormality, she hides her condition. Her murders are seemingly a way of giving her inner peace. Fujino has the special ability to bend space/objects with her mind which she uses as a murder weapon, twisting the bodies of her victims until they are no more than broken bags of meat
